title: DeepSeek
description: A useful Minecraft AI Chat Plugin
body:
![Supported Core](https://img.shields.io/badge/Supported_Engine-Spigot|Folia-blue)
![Supported Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/Supported_Version-1.7.x--26.x-blue)
![Free](https://img.shields.io/badge/Free-Yes-blue)
![Latest Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?url=https%3A%2F%2Fricedoc.handyplus.cn%2Fversion.json&query=%24.DeepSeek&prefix=v&label=Latest%20Version)

## 1. Introduction

> DeepSeek —— A somewhat useful MC(AI) dialogue plugin

1. This plugin can use commands for AI chat
2. This plugin can be bound to multiple NPC plugins, click to start AI chat
3. This plugin can directly call AI in chat (requires PlayerChat plugin)
4. AI chat personas can be configured in advance
5. AI chat supports context association
6. This plugin not only supports DeepSeek, but also other compatible large language models

![DeepSeek](https://ricedoc.handyplus.cn/plugin/DeepSeek/1.webp)

## 2. Required Plugins

**Choose one of the following NPC plugins**

Citizens2  
[Citizens2](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/13811)

Adyeshach   
[Adyeshach](https://a.ptms.ink/)

ZNPCsPlus   
[ZNPCsPlus](https://modrinth.com/plugin/znpcsplus)

FancyNpcs   
[FancyNpcs](https://modrinth.com/plugin/fancynpcs)

PlayerChat Chat Plugin (requires 1.2.4+)  
[PlayerChat](https://ricedoc.handyplus.cn/wiki/PlayerChat/README)
